creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 224954
patch for x11-themes/kde-icons-black-and-white

This port effectively has no LICENSE. It also
has no MAINTAINER. I already maintain at least
one of this set and want to improve these ports.
As they all share a common file which I want
to modify
x11-themes/kde-icons-noia/Makefile.icons
So I'm just going to take MAINTAINER for all
those (unmaintained) so as to add an actual
LICENSE to those that come with one, and add
an appropriate LICENSE && TEXT for those that
don't.

Changes
Makefile (LICENSE, LICENSE_NAME, LICENSE_TEXT,
 LICENSE_PERMS, MAINTAINER)

That's it.

Builds/Works as intended on 12/amd64 13/amd64

Thanks! :-)

--Chris
